# ISSUE_TEMPLATE

GitHub issue templates that provide structured forms for reporting bugs, requesting features, and flagging documentation needs.

## Files

- **`bug_report.md`** - Template for reporting bugs with sections for description, reproduction steps, expected vs. actual behavior, and environment details.
- **`feature_request.md`** - Template for proposing new features with sections for the problem, proposed solution, and alternatives considered.
- **`documentation_need.md`** - Template for requesting documentation improvements or identifying gaps.
